problem_statement: Given a linked list, sort its nodes based on the data value in them. Return the head of the sorted linked list.

examples.explanation: The input linked list when sorted from [3, 4, 2, 1, 5] results in a linked list with values [1, 2, 3, 4, 5].
The input linked list when sorted from [40, 20, 60, 10, 50, 30] results in a linked list with values [10, 20, 30, 40, 50, 60].
